inputs.label: Location (μ)
inputs.businessContext: Location parameter of the GEV distribution (center).

businessContext_i18n.en: Location parameter of the GEV distribution (center).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Paramètre de localisation de la distribution GEV (centre).
businessContext_i18n.es: Parámetro de ubicación de la distribución GEV (centro).

inputs.label: Scale (σ)
inputs.businessContext: Scale parameter, must be > 0. Controls spread.

businessContext_i18n.en: Scale parameter, must be > 0. Controls spread.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçek parametresi, > 0 olmalıdır. Yayılımı kontrol eder.
businessContext_i18n.de: Skalenparameter, muss > 0 sein. Steuert die Streuung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Paramètre d'échelle, doit être > 0. Contrôle la dispersion.
businessContext_i18n.es: Parámetro de escala, debe ser > 0. Controla la dispersión.

inputs.label: Shape (ξ)
inputs.businessContext: Shape parameter. ξ>0 heavy-tailed, ξ=0 Gumbel, ξ<0 bounded.

businessContext_i18n.en: Shape parameter. ξ>0 heavy-tailed, ξ=0 Gumbel, ξ<0 bounded.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şekil parametresi. ξ>0 ağır kuyruklu, ξ=0 Gumbel, ξ<0 sınırlı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Formparameter. ξ>0 schwerer Rand, ξ=0 Gumbel, ξ<0 begrenzt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Paramètre de forme. ξ>0 queue lourde, ξ=0 Gumbel, ξ<0 bornée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Parámetro de forma. ξ>0 cola pesada, ξ=0 Gumbel, ξ<0 acotado.

inputs.label: Return Period
inputs.businessContext: Average recurrence interval in years (e.g., 100 for 100-year event).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average recurrence interval in years (e.g., 100 for 100-year event).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıl cinsinden ortalama yinelenme aralığı (ör. 100 yıllık olay için 100).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliches Wiederkehrintervall in Jahren (z. B. 100 für ein 100-jähriges Ereignis).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Intervalle de récurrence moyen en années (ex. 100 pour un événement centennal).
businessContext_i18n.es: Intervalo de recurrencia promedio en años (ej. 100 para evento de 100 años).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
